name: Agung Dwi Sahputra
headline: Full-Stack Web Developer
subheadline: 3+ Years of Experience | BNSP Certified System Analyst | Bachelor's in Information Systems
bio: Experienced Web Developer with 3 years of expertise in Laravel, building responsive, dynamic, and scalable web applications. Proficient in SOLID principles, clean coding practices, and modern frameworks like Bootstrap and TailwindCSS. Focus on optimized database design, SEO, and fast load speeds. Proven track record of on-time project delivery, providing clients with maintainable solutions and strategic recommendations for product growth.
